intro.name: Natasha Naorem
intro.tagline: Software engineer building cloud-native systems, with a research focus on AI for cybersecurity.

education.detail: Thesis: Foundational Models for AI in Cybersecurity · GPA 4.5

bullets: Executed QA, debugging, and validation workflows to improve software reliability and reproducibility of research.
Designed and deployed AWS-based containerized CI/CD pipelines enabling automated builds, testing, and secure deployments across development environments.
Documented pipeline architecture and operational workflows to support team knowledge sharing and future automation initiatives.
Built a React + TypeScript dashboard analyzing 1000+ SonarQube telemetry logs to surface trends in code quality and technical debt.
Migrated to Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines to automate builds, deployments, and monitoring for distributed research systems.
Improved engineering decision-making by integrating static analysis and DevOps telemetry into real-time dashboards.
Collaborated with global engineering, design, and product teams to ship production features aligned with business and customer needs.
Built scalable React + TypeScript UI components using Ant Design, including reusable table systems with CRUD operations and generic filtering.
Integrated reusable components across 7+ platform areas, improving maintainability and reducing future development effort by ~40%.
Resolved critical UI/UX defects and optimized rendering performance for 1,000+ active users.
Developed a cross-platform Electron.js desktop utility leveraging OCR (Tesseract.js) to streamline internal data exchange workflows.
Partnered cross-functionally to deploy responsive product webpages, increasing early user engagement for new mobile applications by ~50%.
Developed secure utility tools in C for a proprietary SDK, improving internal data handling and workflows.
Redesigned and implemented accessible Flutter/Dart UIs for iOS applications, improving usability and compliance with accessibility standards.
Led a multidisciplinary team serving 2,300+ engineering students, fostering inclusivity and technical leadership.
Increased program participation by 40% through data-driven analysis, stakeholder feedback, and targeted outreach initiatives.
Eliminated a $25K deficit within a $45K operating budget using analytics-driven planning and operational optimization.

projects.name: DemoVerse
projects.subtitle: Custom Sandboxes for Demos · GenAI Genesis 2026
projects.blurb: Next.js platform that uses LLM-driven GitHub analysis to detect application features and external services, then generates Dockerized sandbox environments with synthetic data.

projects.name: Wearable Navigation Assistant
projects.subtitle: 1st Place · Ontario Tech ECSE Capstone 2025
projects.blurb: AI-assisted navigation system integrating computer vision, IoT sensors, and edge processing for real-time obstacle detection. End-to-end architecture across ML camera hardware, gateway services, and assistive devices.

projects.name: TutorBo!
projects.subtitle: AR/VR Tutoring Assistant · Top 50, Hack the Valley 2024
projects.blurb: Immersive 3D conversational tutoring system using three.js, AR/VR frameworks, and NLP models (Cohere, GCP) to enhance learning engagement.

certifications.title: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals
certifications.detail: ML & generative AI foundations, Azure OpenAI Service, computer vision, NLP, speech AI, responsible AI, model evaluation.

certifications.title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
certifications.detail: Azure cloud architecture, compute & storage, identity & access, security, cost management and subscriptions.

certifications.detail: Access control, incident response fundamentals, disaster recovery.

certifications.title: IBM SkillsBuild Cybersecurity Analyst
certifications.detail: Threat analysis, risk mitigation, application & network security, incident response, secure software development.

certifications.title: IBM Professional Product Management
certifications.detail: Agile & scrum methodologies, product lifecycle, requirements analysis, data-driven decision making.
